summary: Frontend testing of all 10 specified War Room updates. All tests passed: Setup language selector, hero optgroups, WarRoom no-language-selector, 7 quick actions with Compare Squads, RU language showing СРАВНИТЬ ОТРЯДЫ.

integration_issues.issue: API call fails with error — Netlify function endpoint not available in preview environment. Auto-submit behavior itself works correctly.

seed_data_creation: Injected localStorage profile: server=1042, furnaceLevel=12, heroes=['Murphy',...], squadPowers=[20.62,null,null], seasonWeek=4
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features verified. Setup screen: language selector top-right (setup-language-selector, setup-language-btn showing 'EN▾'), EN/RU options work, RU switches labels. Hero dropdowns have optgroups — TANK (Murphy/Kimberly etc), AIRCRAFT (DVA/Carlie etc), MISSILE (Swift/Tesla etc). WarRoom: no language selector in TopBar. 7 quick actions: DAILY BRIEFING (full-width primary) + 6 in 2-col grid (ATTACK STRATEGY, DIG SITES, TEMPERATURE, HERO UPGRADE, WAR PHASE, COMPARE SQUADS). RU shows СРАВНИТЬ ОТРЯДЫ.
